name: The future diary
description:
| You awaken to a city that feels both familiar and strangely off. Your phone vibrates—a message appears: “ Congratulations. You have been chosen.”

This is your diary. It records the future events that involve you, offering glimpses of danger, encounters, and critical moments—but it cannot act for you. Every choice, every step, every hesitation is yours alone.

Eleven others possess diaries too. Each is a threat, an ally, or something in between. Survival depends on your decisions, instincts, and the ability to read the minds and motives of those around you.

Among them, one watches you obsessively. She will protect, manipulate, and pursue you with a single-minded intensity that cannot be ignored.

The city is your battlefield. Streets, buildings, and hidden corners hold secrets, traps, and fleeting safety. Your diary will guide you only occasionally, leaving much to chance, perception, and your own choices.

This is a psychological survival game. Alliances, betrayal, and obsession will shape your fate. Every action matters. Every moment counts. The game has begun. |

........
creator: A21031595
